scripts.start: pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter server start
scripts.reinstall: pnpm store prune && rm -rf node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml && pnpm install
scripts.simulate:prod: rm -rf node_modules packages/*/dist && pnpm install && pnpm build:types && pnpm --filter client build-only && pnpm --filter server start
